languages.text: "Всецело одобряю ваше решение, Ваша Светлость. Опытные солдаты — ценный ресурс, которым не стоит разбрасываться".
"I wholly concur with your decision, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Experienced soldiers are a valuable resource that should not be squandered."
languages.original_text: "Всецело одобряю ваше решение, Ваша Светлость. Опытные солдаты — ценный ресурс, которым не стоит разбрасываться".

traits.locale_text: "I wholly concur with your decision, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Experienced soldiers are a valuable resource that should not be squandered."
"I wholly concur with your decision, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Experienced soldiers are a valuable resource that should not be squandered."
"I wholly concur with your decision, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Experienced soldiers are a valuable resource that should not be squandered."

languages.text: 「貴殿の判断に完全に賛成です。経験豊富な兵士は貴重な資源であり、浪費すべきではありません」
languages.original_text: "I wholly concur with your decision, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Experienced soldiers are a valuable resource that should not be squandered."

traits.locale_text: 「貴殿の判断に完全に賛成です。経験豊富な兵士は貴重な資源であり、浪費すべきではありません。」

languages.text: «Estoy totalmente de acuerdo con su decisión, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Los soldados veteranos son un recurso valioso que no debemos desperdiciar».
languages.original_text: "I wholly concur with your decision, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Experienced soldiers are a valuable resource that should not be squandered."

traits.locale_text: «Estoy totalmente de acuerdo con su decisión, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Los soldados veteranos son un recurso valioso que no debemos desperdiciar».

languages.text: “我完全支持您的决策，大人。经验丰富的战士是宝贵资源，不应轻易折损。”
languages.original_text: "I wholly concur with your decision, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Experienced soldiers are a valuable resource that should not be squandered."

traits.locale_text: “我完全支持您的决策，大人。经验丰富的战士是宝贵资源，不应轻易折损。”

languages.text: "Ich bin ganz Eurer Meinung, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Erfahrene Soldaten sind ein wertvoller Rohstoff, der nicht vergeudet werden sollte."
languages.original_text: "I wholly concur with your decision, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Experienced soldiers are a valuable resource that should not be squandered."

traits.locale_text: "Ich bin ganz Eurer Meinung, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Erfahrene Soldaten sind ein wertvoller Rohstoff, der nicht vergeudet werden sollte."

languages.text: "Kararınıza tamamen katılıyorum {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Deneyimli askerler, harcanmaması gereken değerli bir kaynaktır."
languages.original_text: "I wholly concur with your decision, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Experienced soldiers are a valuable resource that should not be squandered."

traits.locale_text: "Kararınıza tamamen katılıyorum {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Deneyimli askerler, harcanmaması gereken değerli bir kaynaktır."

languages.text: « Je soutiens entièrement votre décision, Votre Seigneurie. Les soldats d'expérience constituent une ressource précieuse qu'il convient de ne pas gaspiller. »
languages.original_text: "I wholly concur with your decision, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Experienced soldiers are a valuable resource that should not be squandered."
